calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-457 competence bootstrap-explorer validation (post-build retest): composed RND drive + credit-replay + developmental anneal + budget, OFF (RND plateau) vs ON x {z_world,raw}; does the composition lift floor->competent past the 5.22 plateau (target ~13.05, toward BC 32.72)?
items.note: DIAGNOSTIC substrate-readiness validation (Step-8 of /implement-substrate for mech457_competence_bootstrap_explorer, IMPLEMENTED ree-v3 main 022a284 2026-07-16). experiment_purpose=diagnostic -> excluded from governance scoring; routes to /failure-autopsy. RE-DERIVE BRAKE RELEASED: >=2 non_contributory MECH-457 autopsies (751-750, 752-753-754, 755, 746c-756) but the named upstream substrate is now BUILT and this is a DISTINCT COMPOSED mechanism (new EXQ NUMBER, not a single-axis bolt-on). GOV-REUSE-1: composed-bootstrap ON foraging vs the 5.22 plateau on both reps recorded in NO prior manifest (751 RND-only; 752-756 converters on sparse base) -> run. OFF/ON minted reuse-eligible per rep (include_driver_script_in_hash=False; for the V3-EXQ-750 INV-088 matched-competent retest). ethics all-false/allow. MECH-457 stays candidate/v3_pending; INV-088 candidate/pending_substrate_reconfirmation. Heavy: z_world cotrain ON=3000ep x 3 seeds; cloud.
